verified_checkpoint_before_c3.description: C0/C1/C2 implemented in dirty working tree. All 125 tests passing.

C3_capacity_aware_squire.test_count_delta: +12 (125->151 after C3+db tests, 156 after C6 tests)

changes: Added SCHEMA_C3 const with assist_discovery_state, assist_rejection_backoff tables and indexes
Added migration step for user_version=8
Updated db tests: fresh_database_reaches_c2_schema now asserts version 10
Added version_seven_database_upgrades_to_c3_schema test
Added migration_is_idempotent_on_reopen test
Added SCHEMA_C5 const with delegation_workspaces table
Added SCHEMA_C7 const with project_roles, validation_checks, completion_attestations tables
Added migration steps for user_version=9 (C5) and user_version=10 (C7)
Added AssistDiscoveryState struct
Added AssistRejectionBackoff struct
Added WakeKind enum (Inbox, AbandonedPark, ReadyPark, CycleBreak, OwnedTask, HelperAssignment, AssistDiscovery) with rank() method
Added WakeCandidate struct
Added AgentActivityState enum (Running, Blocked, OwnedWorkReady, HelpAssignmentReady, AvailableToHelp, ProjectComplete, Disabled, Idle) with as_str()
Added AgentStatus struct
Added WorkspaceConfig and WorkspaceMode structs/enums with serde support
Added WorkspaceMode::as_str() and parse()
Added ProjectCompletionReport and CompletionBlocker structs
Added Serialize/Deserialize/Default derives to AssistPolicy
Added workspace field to Config struct with #[serde(default)]
Added WorkspaceConfig to Config::default()
Added wake_kind_rank_is_in_priority_order test
Added agent_activity_state_as_str_is_stable test
Added assist_backlog_fingerprint(tasks) -> String (SHA-256 of sorted task IDs)
Added list_ready_owned_tasks(conn, agent) (Ready state, deps satisfied)
Added list_runnable_helper_assignments(conn, agent, now) (active helper with active unexpired delegation)
Added list_assistable_tasks(conn, helper, now) (open policy, non-terminal, non-review, deps satisfied)
Added count_outstanding_offers_for_helper(conn, helper)
Added get_assist_discovery_state(conn, helper)
Added record_discovery_wake(conn, helper, fingerprint, now, cooldown_until)
Added record_offer_fingerprint(conn, helper, fingerprint, offer_id, now)
Added record_rejection_backoff(conn, helper, owner, now) with exponential backoff 5m/10m/20m/40m capped 24h
Added clear_rejection_backoff(conn, helper, owner)
Added rejection_backoff_active(conn, helper, owner, now)
Added insert_delegation_workspace(conn, delegation_id, mode, path, branch, created_at)
Added get_delegation_workspace(conn, delegation_id)
Added evaluate_project_completion(conn) -> ProjectCompletionReport (checks running agents, non-terminal tasks, open delegations, failed validation, attestation)
Added completion_fingerprint(conn) -> String (SHA-256 of sorted tasks/delegations/reviews/validations)
Added record_completion_attestation(conn, actor, role, note, now)
Added designate_project_role(conn, agent, role, designated_by, now)
Added upsert_validation_check(conn, name, required, status, revision, details, now)
Added C5 test: delegation_workspace_round_trips

Added C7 tests: quiet_blocked_project_is_not_complete, empty_project_is_eligible_for_completion, active_task_blocks_completion, submitted_delegation_blocks_completion, completion_fingerprint_is_stable, completion_fingerprint_changes_with_state, attestation_requires_designated_role, new_task_invalidates_old_attestation
Updated imports to include new model types
Added urgency_rank(priority) helper (critical=3, high=2, normal=1, low=0)
Added WakePlan struct with candidates, abandoned_parks, cycle: Option<CycleBreakPlan>
Added CycleBreakPlan struct
Added wake_plan(ctx) -> WakePlan (pure, side-effect-free planning)
Refactored wake_candidates to wrap wake_plan and clear resolved cycles
Refactored tick to use wake_plan and apply side effects (park deletion, cycle attempt recording, escalation messages, discovery cooldown) only after successful cmd_wake launch
Added agent_activity_status(ctx, agent) -> AgentStatus (read-only, does not call wake_plan)
Added agent_activity_statuses(ctx) -> Vec<AgentStatus>
New wake priorities: OwnedTask (pass 3), HelperAssignment (pass 4), AssistDiscovery (pass 5 during partial idleness)
Deterministic candidate sorting by (kind rank, urgency desc, agent asc, task asc, delegation asc)
One candidate per agent (first wins after sort)
Discovery anti-churn: cooldown, fingerprint, outstanding offer limit (1), rejection backoff

Added 12 C3 tests: ready_owned_task_requires_done_dependencies, active_helper_assignment_wakes_helper, offered_delegation_does_not_wake_helper, pending_offer_suppresses_assist_discovery, assist_discovery_occurs_during_partial_idleness, unchanged_offered_fingerprint_suppresses_repeat_discovery, candidate_order_is_deterministic, deferred_abandoned_park_is_not_deleted, deferred_cycle_break_does_not_increment_attempt_count, max_concurrent_two_preserves_c0_ceiling_report, agent_activity_status_idle_when_no_work, agent_activity_status_available_to_help
cmd_help_offer: records offer fingerprint via record_offer_fingerprint after offer insertion
cmd_help_deny: records rejection backoff via record_rejection_backoff after rejection
cmd_help_accept: clears rejection backoff via clear_rejection_backoff after acceptance
cmd_status: shows agent activity state from squire::agent_activity_status
cmd_status: shows project completion block from store::evaluate_project_completion
Changed 'prop' to 'squire' throughout BOOTSTRAP_TEMPLATE
Revised law 3: cross-domain writes now require active delegation + lease, not just claim-grant
Added 'Cross-domain assistance' section with work list --assistable, help offer, work submit, work review instructions
Updated command crib sheet with --delegation, work list, help offer, work submit, work review

Added 10 C4 tests: prompt_contains_assistable_listing_command, prompt_contains_one_offer_limit, prompt_contains_help_offer_command, prompt_prohibits_writes_before_delegation, prompt_requires_both_delegation_and_lease, prompt_contains_work_submit_command, prompt_contains_work_review_command, prompt_mentions_designated_reviewer, prompt_no_longer_claims_grant_alone_suffices, prompt_uses_squire_not_prop
Added WorkKind enum (Implementation, Investigation) with Default
Added CollisionRisk enum (Low, Medium, High)

Extended PlannedWork with: id (Option<String>), depends_on (Vec<String>), desired_parallelism (u32 default 1), assist_policy (AssistPolicy default Open), reviewer (Option<String>), subtasks (Vec<PlannedWork>), collision_risk (Option<CollisionRisk>), work_kind (WorkKind default Implementation), path_scope (Vec<String>), acceptance (Vec<String>)
Added Default impl for PlannedWork
Changed BiplanePlanTask to use #[serde(flatten)] work: PlannedWork instead of separate subject/body fields
Updated plan_to_description to clone t.work instead of constructing PlannedWork from scratch
Updated plan_from_description to use work: w.clone() instead of subject: w.subject.clone()

Updated apply_plan_to_session: uses t.work.subject/t.work.body, creates tasks with desired_parallelism/assist_policy/path_scope/acceptance from PlannedWork, creates subtasks with parent_task set, creates reviewer assignments, resolves depends_on to real task IDs in second pass
Updated lib.rs and biplane.rs references from task.subject/task.body to task.work.subject/task.work.body

Added 5 C6 tests: legacy_planned_work_defaults, enriched_planned_work_round_trips, apply_plan_creates_subtasks_with_parent, apply_plan_creates_reviewer_assignment, apply_plan_preserves_parallelism_and_policy
Updated PlannedWork test literal to use ..Default::default()
Added Serialize/Deserialize/Default derives to AssistPolicy with #[serde(rename_all = "lowercase")]

what_is_done: WorkspaceConfig and WorkspaceMode added to models.rs with serde
workspace field added to Config with #[serde(default)]
workspace.mode added to KNOWN_CONFIG_KEYS, config_get, config_set, cmd_config_explain in lib.rs
delegation_workspaces table added as schema v9
insert_delegation_workspace and get_delegation_workspace store functions added
what_is_not_done: Worktree creation on help accept (git worktree add)
Worktree mode submission validation (clean index, HEAD check)

what_is_done: project_roles, validation_checks, completion_attestations tables added as schema v10
evaluate_project_completion store function added (checks running agents, non-terminal tasks, open delegations, failed validation, attestation fingerprint)
completion_fingerprint store function added (SHA-256 of sorted tasks/delegations/reviews/validations)
record_completion_attestation store function added (requires designated role, eligible state)
designate_project_role and upsert_validation_check store functions added
cmd_status shows agent activity state from C3 primitives
cmd_status shows project completion block (INCOMPLETE/ELIGIBLE/COMPLETE with blockers)

8 C7 tests added: quiet_blocked_project_is_not_complete, empty_project_is_eligible_for_completion, active_task_blocks_completion, submitted_delegation_blocks_completion, completion_fingerprint_is_stable, completion_fingerprint_changes_with_state, attestation_requires_designated_role, new_task_invalidates_old_attestation
what_is_not_done: CLI commands for project roles/validation/completion attestation (currently only store APIs and status rendering)

current_compile_errors.error: mismatched closing delimiter - println! macro missing closing );
current_compile_errors.root_cause: An edit to fix PlannedWork literals in the apply_plan_records_planned_work_as_ledger_tasks test accidentally left a println! macro in cmd_biplane_interactive without its closing );. The assert_eq! line from the apply_plan_falls_back_to_project_default_when_domain_has_no_model test ended up inside the println! call. Also, two PlannedWork literals in the test still use old format (body/priority fields) instead of ..Default::default().
current_compile_errors.fix: Add ); after line 2044 (the } closing the if-else block). Update PlannedWork literals at lines 2054-2063 to use ..Default::default(). Restore the missing apply_plan_falls_back_to_project_default_when_domain_has_no_model test function that was accidentally truncated.

current_compile_errors.error: expected one of ., ;, ?, }, or an operator, found =>
current_compile_errors.root_cause: A function body (likely cmd_relaunch or similar) is truncated at line 780 (.max_by_key call) and immediately followed by a match arm from the handle function at line 781. The code between the max_by_key and the match dispatch is missing - likely lost during an edit to add workspace.mode config support.
current_compile_errors.fix: Need to restore the missing function body between the .max_by_key call and the Some(Command::Config) match arm. Check git diff for the original code.

work_remaining.description: Fix the two compile errors in biplane.rs and lib.rs described above. The biplane.rs fix requires adding ); after the if-else block at line 2044, updating two PlannedWork literals to use ..Default::default(), and restoring the truncated apply_plan_falls_back_to_project_default_when_domain_has_no_model test. The lib.rs fix requires restoring the missing function body between the .max_by_key call and the match arm.
Complete C5 workspace isolation: add worktree creation on help accept, worktree mode submission validation, review accept stale-base validation. These are command-level changes in commands.rs.

Complete C7 telemetry metrics and tick_detailed. The completion evaluator and status rendering are done. Remaining: add telemetry spans for capacity/idle/offer/accept metrics, add tick_detailed wrapper.
Update README.md with: ownership vs assistance model, help/work CLI commands, delegated write requirements, forbidden paths, assist discovery behavior, workspace mode, completion model, config keys.
Verify install.sh supports --bump-version and --set-version. Run install.sh --help.
Run cargo fmt, cargo build, cargo test, git diff --check. Then create a local commit with all changes (excluding .trelane/trelane.db).

files_changed_summary.src/biplane.rs: C6: PlannedWork extension, BiplanePlanTask flatten, apply_plan_to_session rewrite, tests
files_changed_summary.src/cli.rs: C2: help/work/submit/review CLI (pre-existing from C2 checkpoint)
files_changed_summary.src/commands.rs: C2: help protocol (pre-existing), C3: anti-churn state in help commands, C7: status activity/completion
files_changed_summary.src/db.rs: C3: v8 migration, C5: v9 migration, C7: v10 migration
files_changed_summary.src/lib.rs: C5: workspace.mode config, C2/C3: dispatch (pre-existing + broken match arm)
files_changed_summary.src/models.rs: C3: WakeKind/WakeCandidate/AgentActivityState/AgentStatus, C5: WorkspaceConfig/WorkspaceMode, C7: ProjectCompletionReport/CompletionBlocker, C6: AssistPolicy serde
files_changed_summary.src/prompt.rs: C4: squire terminology, cross-domain assistance section, updated command crib sheet
files_changed_summary.src/store.rs: C3: discovery/backoff/fingerprint/assistable APIs, C5: workspace store, C7: completion evaluator/fingerprint/attestation APIs, tests
files_changed_summary.src/squire.rs: C3: wake_plan refactor, tick side-effect deferral, activity status, new wake priorities, tests
files_changed_summary.src/testing.rs: C2: stale call fixes (pre-existing from checkpoint repair)
